name: static-site-deploy
description: Deploy a static site directory to a live HTTPS URL. Provider handles web server config, DNS, SSL, and verification.

tools.name: deploy_static_site
tools.description: Deploy a static site directory to a live URL

source_dir.description: Absolute path to directory containing static files (must include index.html)

subdomain.description: Subdomain to deploy to (e.g., 'mysite' deploys to mysite.<parent_domain>)

hints.description: Optional sideband dict. Providers read keys they care about, ignore the rest.

update_only.description: If true, only update files — skip Nginx/DNS/tunnel config
